summary: A clip from a local television news report. Sampled frames show a fanned stack of legal documents headed 'National Injury Attorneys' beside a portrait of a man with a caption reading 'ABEL GBLAH', over an aerial background of a building. Another frame shows a brick school building with a caption reading 'ON HER WAY TO SCHOOL NURSE, 10-YEAR-OLD GIRL SEES GBLAH'.
